response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The lyrics in the reference JSON ('痛くて...') were not present in this teaser clip. However, the song title 'Fashion Beat' matches the audible chant during the countdown. 2. JSON Usage: Discarded the reference lyrics as they were not audible; instead, utilized manual transcription and translation for prominent visual text (title card, guest names) and audio chants. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles for the title card and guest names were anchored to their visual on-screen duration, while the 'Fashion Beat' chants were tightly synchronized with the audio vocalizations.
